hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in */src/*.js|*/src/*.jsx) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$FILE" in */styles/*) exit 0 ;; esac; BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed 's/\.\(js\|jsx\)$//'); PROJECT_ROOT=${FILE%/src/*}; if ! find "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests" -iname "${BASENAME}.test.js" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"No test file found for ${BASENAME}. Add tests in tests/unit/ before finishing.\"}}"; fi
